description: Diameter bands, DDR→drill cycle, stock-to-leave, RF/FINISH split, and tap drill table — mirrors 4. process_selection.py until a loader is wired.

preferred_machine.notes: Boss and large_bore use this for primary vs alternate sequences; holes and planar_face always milling.

drill_diameter_bands_mm.twist_band_rule: micro_drill_max_exclusive ≤ d ≤ twist_drill_max_inclusive → spot_drill then twist_drill
drill_diameter_bands_mm.core_band_rule: twist_drill_max_inclusive < d ≤ core_drill_max_inclusive → spot_drill, pilot_drill (60% of final D), core_drill

rules: ddr is None or ddr ≤ ddr_standard_max_inclusive → standard

boss_turning_note: Below this diameter, milling contour is preferred when PREFERRED_MACHINE is milling.

face_mill_max_ap_mm.rule: If feature depth > max_ap for material, emit RF then FINISH face_mill passes.

tap_drill_table_mm.comment: Key = nominal metric thread diameter; value = ISO 68-1 tap drill diameter. Non-table: nearest within 0.5mm else thread_dia * 0.8

warnings: Slot/pocket process branches may still fall through to manual_review in select_process() until those feature types are fully wired.

LIVE (applied at import): all drill bands, DDR thresholds, boss_turning_min_diameter, stock_to_leave tables, face_mill_max_ap, rf_split_operations, drill_like_operations, tap_drill_table, corner_r_feature_types.
